rulings.Case Title: GREGORY KEMPTON VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR OPTION ONE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pltf'S Complaint For Failure To Timely Amend;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 26, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANTS WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR OPTION ONE, HOMEWARD RESIDENTIAL, INC., and POWER DEFAULT SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint For Failure To Timely Amend DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. No evidence of Notice of Entry of Order Provided. No exhibits attached to Arlas Declaration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KRISTINA M. DOORLAG et al VS. VINCENT PASQUINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Payment Of Atty'S Fees And Costs '
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 26, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS VINCENT PASQUINI and JAYMI TEDDY's Amended Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Payment Of Attorney's Fees And Costs Defendants' Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens is DENIED. Plaintiffs state a real property claim regarding "the right to possession of specific real property" pursuant to CCP 405.4 Plaintiffs seek declaration of their rights in respect to property pursuant to CCP 1060 regarding actual controversy. See DeLaura v. Becket (2006) 137 Cal.App.4th 542, 546. Plaintiffs allege in their complaint that possession was recovered from Mr. Hoefer after statements were made regarding owner move in eviction. Defendants maintain that there was no owner move in eviction. Plaintiffs satisfy their burden to show probable validity of their claim - Sale offer/purchase contract; Mr. Hoefer's declaration; presumption provided for by SFRO 37.10A(e). Plaintiffs' request for attorney's fees is granted in the amount of $10,130. = (501/REQ)
